svg.text: Reading of the proto-cuneiform inscription on fragment HF-A-1 (clay, ca. 2nd millennium BCE)

g.text: The pair beside the Pamir marker:
"...the [stone] which holds the man-who-does-not-end. Eight generations the [seal] keeps. The flower beside [him]..."
"...[binding] not to be broken. The three arms point to him. Read by the count of the days..."
"...beyond the [last river] in the [cold quarter]. Do not open. Do not return."
Lacunae represented in [brackets]. Three glyph clusters along the lower border remain undeciphered; see ref. R-7.
